response.justification: This candidate demonstrates strong full-stack software engineering skills, mentoring ability, and experience shipping products at scale. However, the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming experience, and the resume shows only ~1-2 years of production C++ work (National Instruments, limited hobby projects). Additionally, while the candidate has infrastructure and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, large-scale systems), there is no demonstrated expertise in cloud compute platform architecture or technical leadership of cloud/infrastructure teams—both critical for this mid-senior role. The gap in the primary technical requirement is disqualifying.
strengths: Proven ability to ship products across multiple domains with strong testing discipline and quality focus
Experienced mentor with a track record of creating workshops, courses, and training programs (Refactoring Dojos, Code Katas, Selenium courses)
Hands-on experience with large-scale systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby), Kubernetes, Docker, and infrastructure tooling
concerns: Critical gap: only ~1-2 years of production C++ experience versus the required 8 years
No demonstrated expertise in cloud compute platform architecture or technical leadership of cloud/infrastructure teams
Lacks Master's or PhD in engineering/computer science (preferred qualification); primary background is broad full-stack rather than deep infrastructure specialization

key_factors.factor: C++ programming experience gap (1-2 years vs. 8 required)
Cloud compute platform domain expertise absent
Proven mentoring and technical communication skills
